title: cacalia undulata
intro: Cacalia undulata, also known as Wavy Leaf or Wild Artichoke, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Cacalia undulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to provide these benefits.
